title: Restore lost wine data and remove logo from PDF export

requirements.summary: Remove the Naturavini logo from the PDF export while keeping all wine catalogue content intact
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Export to PDF' generates a PDF with no logo image anywhere in the document.
The PDF still contains the full wine catalogue grouped by country with all columns (Winery, Wine Name, Year, Wine Style, Grape Variety, Region, Price).
No errors are thrown during PDF generation related to logo loading.

file_operations.description: Remove the logo image from the PDF export function. Locate the jsPDF generation code in the exportToPDF handler and remove any addImage() calls or logo-related code that adds the Naturavini logo to the PDF document. Keep all wine catalogue content (country groupings, table headers, wine data rows with all columns) intact. Ensure the PDF generation still works without errors after removing logo references.
